_comment: IBKR live-data backtest config — sibling of config.json / config.tomac.json. The agent loop runs strategies in user_data/strategies_ibkr/ via `uv run run_ibkr.py`. Data must be prepared first via `uv run prepare_ibkr.py --from-redis` (or --from-csv-dir).

exchange._comment: exchange.name MUST be a real ccxt name (binance is the universally-installed one) so freqtrade boots, but no API call is made during backtest. pair_whitelist holds synthetic IBKR pseudo-pairs that prepare_ibkr.py writes feather files for. Add/remove pairs to match what your bridge config subscribes to.
exchange.name: binance

_timerange_comment: Adjust to whatever date window your prepared feathers cover. With --from-redis you typically have only the last few days; with --from-csv-dir you can have years.
